name: Homeland Security Corporation
summary: Homeland Security Corporation engages in consulting and implementing security driven technologies that can be deployed in various environments to meet a client's security or regulatory needs. The company offers various visual and audio surveillance systems, biometric surveillance systems, high speed process monitoring, and counter surveillance products. It also provides Advanced Crane Payload Surveillance System, which could be adapted to various crane systems. In addition, the company offers MMJ/MJ security, surveillance, and compliance systems and services, such as DVR systems, security cameras, covert systems, wireless TX/RX sets, and CCTV equipment; point of sale systems; security and surveillance systems; biometric access control standalone and managed systems; legal consultation services; trimming and harvesting services; and security, access control, legal aspects, complete operation consulting services. The company was incorporated in 1997 is based in Wrightwood, California.
